purpose: Primary-source gate for the rowpair-v1 adjacency-row discriminator

sources.use: Maintained status and revision date; records 43 <= R(5,5) <= 46.

current_publication.finding: The journal article proves only R(5,5) <= 46; no newer exact determination was found in the recorded 2026-07-21 search.
